epigraph.text: The average man does not want to be free. He simply wants to be safe.

follyOfTheDay.headline: Town Council Bans Grass Color, Mandates Exact 2.3-Inch Height
follyOfTheDay.summary:
A suburban municipality in Ohio has enacted a new ordinance that specifies the precise acceptable shade of lawn green, measured against Pantone color charts, with fines of $500 per day for deviations. The regulation emerged after a heated city council meeting where residents debated whether Kentucky bluegrass was "too blue" and argued that perennial ryegrass presented an "optical assault" on the neighborhood aesthetic.

The ordinance's 47-page enforcement manual includes a standardized measuring device that residents must allow inspectors to use on their lawns weekly. Violations have already been issued to three homeowners whose grass allegedly measured 2.7 inches—a 0.4-inch overstep that the municipality deems a public nuisance.
follyOfTheDay.commentary: Democracy, it turns out, is two wolves and a lawn. The wolves won.
